Transformers: Dark of the Moon (2011)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $352,390,543Details
International Box Office $771,403,536
Worldwide Box Office $1,123,794,079
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $54,166,627
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $59,750,429
Total $113,917,056
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When a mysterious event from Earth’s past erupts into the present day it threatens to bring a war to Earth so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save us.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$97,852,865 (27.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.60 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:31.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$195,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,088 opening theaters/4,107 max. theaters, 5.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $531,474,258

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 29th, 2011 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
June 29th, 2011 (IMAX) by Paramount Pictures
Video Release: September 30th, 2011 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense prolonged sequences of sci-fi action violence, mayhem and destruction, and for language, some sexuality and innuendo.
(Rating bulletin 2172, 5/18/2011)
Running Time: 154 minutes
Franchise: Transformers
Cast, crew, or production detail: Prologue, Visual Effects, Voiceover/Narration
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Shot in 3-D, IMAX: DMR
Filming location (city or town): Chicago, IL, Detroit, MI, Gary, IN, Houston, TX, Long Beach, CA, Milwaukee, WI, New York, NY, Rochester Hills, MI, Washington, DC - United States, Whiting, IN

Synopsis

When a mysterious event from Earth’s past erupts into the present day it threatens to bring a war to Earth so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save us.
